title: LeagueCohort (R-I6) — a durable weekly league grouping (one tier, one ISO-week). SHARED across its members (no single owner), so it carries NO user_id; client read of a member's own cohort is a server-side (SECURITY DEFINER) path in a later slice, never a direct cross-row client SELECT.

tier.description: LeagueTier.name for the whole cohort: bronze|silver|gold|sapphire|ruby|emerald|amethyst|pearl|obsidian|diamond (stored as text; the engine maps an unknown value to bronze for forward-compat).

week_start.description: The Monday (date-only) of the league week this cohort runs, per LeagueWeek.startOf.
